hypothesis: At least one supplied file contains confidential information.
supporting_evidence: review_note.txt (and its duplicate) contains references to Project Nightjar and specifies distribution restricted to project lead and security reviewer.

hypothesis: review_note.txt and review_note_copy.txt are exact duplicates.
supporting_evidence: Byte-by-byte comparison via cmp and diff confirmed no differences. Both files share identical SHA-256 hashes (62257dd5a11fd4849723ff768fae875452c51d8adaf9d44e5deb8b5cb9866f48).

hypothesis: The available files are insufficient to attribute creation or copying to a person.
supporting_evidence: The evidence set contains only plain text file contents and lacks system logs, registry hives, user account audit records, or original metadata linking files to individuals.
